creator: flz@xbsd.org
text:
I'm not sure this is really useful.

	This PR is here for a long time now, there'a a plist script in 
	${PORTSDIR}/Tools/script aimed at creating automagically 
	pkg-plist file, and it does the job quite well.

	Since this is really developer-oriented feature, we should keep
	this outside of bsd.port.mk.

-- 
Florent Thoumie
flz@xbsd.org
